hero.title: Organize your food without starting from scratch every day.
hero.subtitle: Plan menus, order purchases, adjust macros when you need to, and cook step by step from a single app.
hero.support_text: CookPilot turns your recipes, menus, days, and weeks into a clear system to decide what to eat, what to buy, and how to cook it.
hero.slide_money_support: Less improvisation. More criteria. More control over what you spend.
hero.slide_time_support: Less back and forth. Less friction. Decide faster what to cook today.
hero.slide_health_support: Better nutrition, without breaking your culture or your real life.
hero.slide_control_support_prefix: Tell me what you have and
hero.slide_control_support_suffix: helps you solve it with clarity.

pillars.title: Six pillars to cook with an advantage
pillars.subtitle: The entire CookPilot system works together to make your life easier.
pillars.p1_desc: Design menus tailored to your tastes and routines in just a few minutes.
pillars.p2_desc: Modify portions and balance macros automatically.
pillars.p3_desc: Generate a grocery list organized by aisles with reference costs.
pillars.p4_desc: Follow recipes step-by-step with active timers and hands-free mode (CookMode).
pillars.p5_desc: Digitize and save recipes from videos, PDFs, photos, or websites in one click.
pillars.p6_desc: Create templates of your favorite weeks and replicate them effortlessly.
pillars.section_support_suffix: is here to help you win something real every week.
pillars.pillar_1_body: Cooking smarter is also a financial decision. CookPilot helps you resolve meals with more criteria, less waste, and better cost visibility.
pillars.pillar_2_body: Less time wondering what to cook. Less back and forth. Less last-minute improvisation. More clarity from the very first step.
pillars.pillar_3_title: Eat better without breaking your reality
pillars.pillar_3_body: Better nutrition shouldn't mean giving up your culture or living in guilt. CookPilot starts from real food, real context, and a real kitchen.

summary.title: What is CookPilot?
summary.new_body: CookPilot helps you organize your daily food: what you are going to eat, what you need to buy, how it fits your goals, and how to prepare it. You can plan menus, import recipes, review quantities, use shopping lists, and cook step by step.
summary.new_note: Use it when you want less improvisation and more clarity. Because cooking at home should not always start from an empty screen, an incomplete list, or the same repeated question: 'what should I make today?'
summary.what_is_body: The smart platform that gives you back control of your kitchen.
summary.problem_body: Eliminates daily indecision, improvisation, and food waste.
summary.connects_body: Links menu planning, grocery shopping, nutrition, and guided cooking.

flow.title: System General Flow
flow.subtitle: A complete and connected cycle for your daily nutrition.

pro.title: CookPilot Pro
pro.subtitle: More capacity to organize your food.
pro.support_line: Activate the full CookPilot system to plan with more freedom, resolve menus, adjust goals, and keep your meals organized week after week.

guides.title: Featured Guides
guides.subtitle: Learn to master CookPilot step by step.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick questions about CookPilot
faq.q1: How do I start using CookPilot?
faq.a1: Simply download the app, create an account, and plan your first menu in a minute.
faq.q2: Is it mandatory to track nutrition macros?
faq.a2: No, CookPilot is useful both for planning simple meals and for tracking strict macros.
faq.a3: Costs are referential to help you estimate your budget while shopping.
faq.q4: What benefits does the Pro plan offer?
faq.a4: Unlocks advanced planning, imports from multiple formats, and priority support.
faq.q5: In which stores is the app available?
faq.a5: It is available in Google Play for most devices and Huawei.

download.title: Download the App
download.subtitle: Take full control of your nutrition from your Android device.

how_it_works.section_support: Tell it your context. CookPilot does the magic. You cook with clarity.
how_it_works.step_1_support: Start from your real kitchen, not an ideal recipe book.
how_it_works.step_2_support: Not a random recipe. A decision with criteria.
how_it_works.step_3_support: Less doubt. More control. Better execution.

brand.section_title_main: CookPilot exists to give you back
brand.section_body: Save money. Save time. Eat better. Less errors, less friction, and more clarity around something as basic as feeding yourself well.

app_showcase.section_subtitle: Choose a part of the system and see how it's used inside the app.
app_showcase.planifica_subtitle: Organize menus by time of day and complete your week without rebuilding everything each time.
app_showcase.ajusta_subtitle: Check kcal and macros, and modify quantities when you have a clear goal.
app_showcase.compra_subtitle: Turn your menus into ingredients, quantities, and reference costs.
app_showcase.cocina_subtitle: Open your menu and cook with steps, times, and ingredients in context.
app_showcase.importa_subtitle: Import recipes from web, video, image, text, or PDF and save them in CookPilot.
app_showcase.reutiliza_subtitle: Find saved, favorite, and imported recipes to repeat without searching again.

demo.section_microcopy: 1 minute. Money, time, and health, grounded in a real product.
demo.summary_body: CookPilot shows how a simple conversation can help you save money, save time, and eat better, solving what to cook with more clarity from your real context.
